# terrible_community_aws_sns (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `msg` (String) Default message for subscriptions without a more specific message.
- `topic` (String) The name or ARN of the topic to publish to.

### Optional

- `application` (String) Message to send to application subscriptions.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `email` (String) Message to send to email subscriptions.
- `email_json` (String) Message to send to email-json subscriptions.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `http` (String) Message to send to HTTP subscriptions.
- `https` (String) Message to send to HTTPS subscriptions.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `lambda` (String) Message to send to Lambda subscriptions.
- `message_attributes` (String) Dictionary of message attributes. These are optional structured data entries to be sent along to the endpoint. This is in AWS's distinct Name/Type/Value format; see example below.
- `message_deduplication_id` (String) Only in connection with the message_group_id. Overwrites the auto generated MessageDeduplicationId. Can contain up to 128 alphanumeric characters and punctuation. Messages with the same deduplication id getting recognized as the same message. Gets overwritten by an auto generated token, if the topic has ContentBasedDeduplication set.
- `message_group_id` (String) A tag which is used to process messages that belong to the same group in a FIFO manner. Has to be included when publishing a message to a fifo topic. Can contain up to 128 alphanumeric characters and punctuation.
- `message_structure` (String) The payload format to use for the message. This must be `json` to support protocol-specific messages (`http`, `https`, `email`, `sms`, `sqs`). It must be `string` to support *message_attributes*.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `sms` (String) Message to send to SMS subscriptions.
- `sqs` (String) Message to send to SQS subscriptions.
- `subject` (String) Message subject
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `message_id` (String) The message ID of the submitted message
- `sequence_number` (String) A 128 bits long sequence number which gets assigned to the message in fifo topics
